dental.subject: I audited {business_name}'s website — found some issues
dental.body:
Hi there,

My name is Aditya — I'm an AI & automation engineer who works exclusively with dental and dermatology practices.

I took a look at {business_name}'s website ({website_url}) and ran a quick audit. Here's what I found:

{website_issues}

These are exactly the kinds of issues that cause dental practices to lose potential patients to competitors — most visitors will leave a site that doesn't work well on mobile, isn't secure, or doesn't let them book online.

I specialise in fixing all of this for dental practices. Here's what I can build for {business_name}:

  → Modern, mobile-first website redesign
  → AI-powered online booking (patients book 24/7 — no phone calls needed)
  → Automated appointment reminders via SMS & email (cuts no-shows by 30%)
  → AI chat assistant that answers patient questions after hours
  → Analytics dashboard so you can see exactly who visits your site
  → Any custom software or automation your practice needs

I'm a solo engineer — everything is built specifically for you, not off-the-shelf. Turnaround is typically 5–7 days.

See a live demo:
{promo_url}

Would you be open to a quick 10-minute call this week? I can walk you through exactly what I'd fix for {business_name}.

Best regards,
Aditya Tyagi
AI & Automation Engineer
(Specialising in Dental & Dermatology Practices)
